title: Surface External ID Fields in ERD with Red Icons and View Toggle
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the ERD, I want to see fields marked as External IDs displayed with distinct red icons and controlled by a per-view toggle, so that I can identify integration points with external systems directly from the entity relationship diagram.
description:
Extends the ERD to display External ID fields alongside the existing lookup fields and primary keys. Salesforce metadata includes an `IsExternalId` attribute on fields that can be used to bridge data from external systems.

### Phase 1 (Implemented):
- The object metadata model is updated to store the `IsExternalId` attribute
- The refresh object fields function now captures the External ID flag during sync
- External ID fields appear in the ERD with red-colored icons (distinct from blue primary keys and green foreign keys)
- A per-view "Show External IDs" toggle is added to the ERD settings, defaulting to off
- External IDs are only visible in the diagram when the toggle is enabled for that view

### Future Phases (Not implemented):
- Phase 2: External ID fields in the Dictionary could open a mapping tab for connecting external tables/objects
- Phase 3: External objects could optionally appear in the ERD
- Long-term vision: Connect to a second Salesforce instance or HubSpot to import external object metadata
acceptance_criteria: External ID fields (IsExternalId = true) appear in the ERD with red-colored icons
A per-view 'Show External IDs' toggle exists in the ERD settings sidebar
The toggle defaults to off — External IDs are hidden by default
Each ERD view independently stores the External ID toggle state
The object metadata model stores the IsExternalId attribute
The refresh function updates the External ID flag during metadata sync
Blue icons continue to represent primary keys, green for foreign keys
ux_changes: External ID fields render as red-colored icons on ERD nodes when the per-view toggle is enabled. Adds a new color category alongside blue (primary keys) and green (foreign keys).
middleware_changes: Updated the refresh object fields function to capture and store the IsExternalId attribute from Salesforce metadata. ERD query updated to include External ID fields when the view toggle is enabled.
data_model_changes: Added showExternalId attribute to the object meta fields model. Per-view 'Show External Ids' setting stored in the ERD view options.
implementation_notes: This is Phase 1 of a multi-phase vision. The broader concept envisions using External IDs as bridges to external systems, potentially connecting external objects to the ERD via a mapping interface. The migration scorecard infrastructure could be repurposed for external object mapping. Future phases would add mapping tabs to Dictionary fields and external object visualization in the ERD.
comment_summary: Developer requested a meeting to understand the multi-phase vision. Implemented Phase 1 with metadata model updates, red icon rendering, and per-view toggle. Deployed to development for review.
